CREATE TABLE [dbo].[__bsd_pm_Projects](
	[Id] [int] IDENTITY(1,1) NOT NULL,
	[ProjectName] [nvarchar](max) NULL,
	[CustomerNumber] [int] NULL,
	[CustomerName] [nvarchar](max) NULL,
	[Status] [nvarchar](max) NULL,
	[StatusId] [int] NULL,
	[PMManagerUserId] [int] NULL,
	[PMManagerUsername] [nvarchar](max) NULL,
	[PMManagerFactoryUserId] [int] NULL,
	[PMManagerFactoryUsername] [nvarchar](max) NULL,
	[CSManagerUserId] [int] NULL,
	[CSManagerUsername] [nvarchar](max) NULL,
	[OfferNumber] [nvarchar](max) NULL,
	[QuantityKS] [decimal](18, 0) NULL,
	[Factory] [int] NULL,
	[Type] [nvarchar](max) NULL,
	[TypeId] [int] NULL,
	[CreationUserId] [int] NULL,
	[CreationTime] [datetime] NULL,
	[DeliveryDate] [datetime] NULL,
	[CustomerRefrence] [nvarchar](max) NULL
)

CREATE TABLE [dbo].[__bsd_pm_Cables](
	[Id] [int] IDENTITY(1,1) NOT NULL,
	[ProjectId] [int] NULL,
	[ArticleId] [int] NULL,
	[ArticleNumber] [nvarchar](max) NULL,
	[ArticleCustomerNumber] [nvarchar](max) NULL,
	[ResponsibleUserId] [int] NULL,
	[ResponsibleUsername] [nvarchar](max) NULL,
	[CreationUserId] [int] NULL,
	[CreationUsername] [nvarchar](max) NULL,
	[Status] [nvarchar](max) NULL,
	[StatusId] [int] NULL,
)

CREATE TABLE [dbo].[__bsd_pm_CurrentTask](
	[Id] [int] IDENTITY(1,1) NOT NULL,
	[CurrentTaskName] [nvarchar](max) NULL,
	[ProjectId] [int] NULL,
	[StartDate] [datetime] NULL,
	[Deadline] [datetime] NULL,
	[Comment] [nvarchar](max) NULL,
	[Status] [nvarchar](20) NULL,
	[StatusId] [nvarchar](20) NULL,
	[CreationUserId] [int] NULL,
	[CreationUsername] [nvarchar](max) NULL,
	[CreationDate] [datetime] NULL
) 

CREATE TABLE [dbo].[__bsd_pm_MileStones](
	[Id] [int] IDENTITY(1,1) NOT NULL,
	[StartDate] [datetime] NULL,
	[EndDate] [datetime] NULL,
	[Comment] [nvarchar](max) NULL,
	[CreationUserId] [int] NULL,
	[CreationTime] [datetime] NULL,
)

CREATE TABLE [dbo].[__bsd_pm_TasksMileStones](
	[Id] [int] IDENTITY(1,1) NOT NULL,
	[IdTask] [int] NULL,
	[TaskName] [nvarchar](max) NULL,
	[IdMileStone] [int] NULL,
)

create table __bsd_pm_logs
(
Id int identity primary key,
ProjectId int,
LogText nvarchar(255),
UserId int,
Username nvarchar(255),
LogTime datetime
)

alter table __BSD_AccessProfile
add 
PMModule bit null,
PMViewProjectsCompact bit null,
PMViewProjectsMedium bit null,
PMViewProjectsDetail bit null,
PMAddProject bit null,
PMEditProject bit null,
PMDeleteProject bit null,
PMAddMileStone bit null,
PMEditMileStone bit null,
PMDeleteMileStone bit null,
PMAddCable bit null,
PMEditCable bit null,
PMDeleteCable bit null
